title: The Lovers
writer: Gaspare Cataldo, Giacomo Gentilomo, Fabrizio Sarazani
actors: Gino Bechi, Annette Bach, Carlo Ninchi
plot: After an astrologer has foretold him he will die at an early age if he does not avoid a romantic entanglement, Alessandro Stradella, a well-known composer decides to leave Rome for the North of Italy. He takes advantage of his tri...
